steps.title: Use the emotional context
steps.content: The motorman is already described as chafing in his box and thinking resentfully about labor. When he registered discontent, the verb must mean that his dissatisfaction became visible or evident.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content: Choice A means avoided. Choice B means signed up or recorded formally. Choice C means considered important. None fit an emotion becoming visible. The remaining word means displayed or showed. The answer is D.
